title: Reviewer finding
description: One structured finding produced by a council reviewer or by Codex.

id.description: Stable finding id, e.g. SEC-001, unique within a report.

file.description: Repo-relative path, or the literal string GENERAL for non-file findings.

lines.description: Line or range, e.g. '42' or '42-58', or 'n/a'.

failure_scenario.description: Concrete inputs/state -> wrong output, crash, or attack path.

verification.description: Exact procedure/command that proves the fix works.

introduced_by_change.description: True if this defect was introduced by the current staged change.

confirmed.description: Set by the council chair after evidence review. Absent/true means it still counts.
